history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The goal is at F05, which is two cells north and two cells east. The cell directly north (D06) is a floor, so I can safely move forward to begin the path. After moving north, I will need to turn east and continue.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,D) is floor and safe. The goal is at (6,F) two cells east. I will move forward to (6,D) first, then turn right and move east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I successfully moved forward to (6,D). Now I am at (6,D) facing north. The goal is at (6,F) two cells east. The cell ahead is a wall, so I need to turn right to face east, then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (5,D) which is two cells north of me. I am currently facing east, so I need to turn left to face north. Then I can move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north, but the cell directly ahead is a wall. The goal is two cells to the east at (7,F). I need to turn right to face east, then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing east after the previous turn. The goal is at (5,D), directly north of my position. The cell (6,D) is floor, and (5,D) is the goal. I need to face north to move straight towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The goal is at row 7, column F, two cells to the east. I need to turn right to face east, then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing north. The goal is directly north at (5,D), two cells away. The cell directly ahead (6,D) is floor, so it is safe to move forward. The next step after that will be to move into the goal. I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, and the cell directly ahead is the goal (G). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
